,-35,26,28,-9,-13,-8,12,3,1,-13,20,6,-50,2,25,-13,-72,4,-45,-5,39,18,30,-73,-44,-47,-38,-21,-55,51,40,-44,-4,-9,-22,-41,18,15,3,21,16,-7,-80,-80,39,-42,-63,22,-70,14,-41,-1,-33,39,12,35,24,44,-26,-32,19,-46,-49,37,12,-43,6,23,36,16,6,-26,17,37,-71,-9,-16,31,33,-55,35,-5,4,-41,-16,-8,15,22,11,-40,-24,-45,-33,-19,-14,-10,-5,34,9,7,39,-32,20,-3,-24,15,-11,62,-27,43,-59,1,1,-28,10,9,-44,-62,-23,-28,18,44,-37,-74,-63,34,9,-51,48,-10,-43,-19,26,27,5,-29,17,2,33,2,-38,-37,-59,13,12,13,-42,6,-25,-16,-16,-60,39,-17,36,19,44,20,35,-3,-24,-17,-4,13,-10,-1,-39,41,-8,35,-8,0,-31,-53,-22,5,-6,-80,-1,-4,10,12,-89,19,15,-62,-32,14,42,-3,48,29,10,16,-14,-14,34,-49,-23,-5,-49,23,-39,-32,-42,38,22,51,39,-29,-31,41,-40,19,-71,10,-23,-1,-2,17,16,-6,2,-49,-33,10,-11,-36,-38,-65,-10,13,-19,2,-26,-42,-47,-24,21,11,-32,-3,9,21,18,-41,34,-2,27,-5,51,-73,-1,-17,29,16,-63,-51,28,-52,-20,-22,28,-66,61,44,-16,-14,-19,-3,10,33,30,6,-35,-40,-40,40,-9,-17,28,20,-21,-45,40,-63,-76,33,-13,35,-10,9,-2,-58,-3,27,8,31,-41,35,-22,23,-8,19,-3,12,3,6,0,-16,16,37,-83,-5,16,-32,-22,38,-14,-64,-1,57,-50,-32,-64,25,23,-33,-13,-16,18,1,12,13,18,-38,52,20,-27,8,-36,-31,-43,-70,58,-58,-43,44,-24,-16,-9,-10,-36,0,28,48,3,-2,-3,-50,30,16,-41,14,-33,-15,-4,-1,31,32,-23,-63,-11,32,-78,24,27,-16,-8,-49,-5,-18,-34,-27,9,11,-24,24,8,-5,9,20,14,-2,26,8,-5,7,-2,-50,22,7,32,8,-7,26,-51,25,-16,4,-66,11,-1,-40,-1,18,-66,-1,8,-16,36,43,-45,-50,-30,27,30,-20,9,-21,-39,3,14,-6,-2,-52,-17,6,9,16,-55,-26,-5,2,21,-24,-1,36,28,-24,-47,22,-2,14,-6,42,22,5,28,-1,6,14,21,-26,16,-25,-32,33,-25,5,-31,10,-20,-53,-6,-2,-68,5,3,21,-16,-34,-9,-8,18,-53,-63,-4,-22,19,-2,0,31,42,-81,7,-6,3,22,-22,16,-4,-41,-1,-35,-51,-12,38,-58,-32,-43,18,-29,8,35,1,33,11,39,-31,15,33,-70,-20,-35,-10,-27,-47,-30,-74,-42,14,26,8,-56,-83,-24,-60,35,37,-6,0,34,-21,37,-42,-8,-40,21,-77,17,-58,-30,21,32,11,-9,-9,-3,-59,-3,-9,4,-11,46,6,24,-12,-6,35,35,-26,10,-37,-48,-27,33,40,-9,11,-20,13,-16,-13,-1,27,-49,21,-3,-25,22,29,-21,20,-34,9,31,-22,-11,43,-55,-20,36,-54, 43,31,-15,-40,26,-58,-9,7,-1,8,-38,-47,-4,-16,-24,63,43,-75,-9,-6,-26,-47,59,-3,0,64,22,8,-6,-3,33,-60,-13,2,23,21,58,-5,36,-35,-13,45,21,-24,0,-46,-78,-13,-16,-28,-47,-3,-11,37,-57,34,27,32,-32,29,-20,-22,-3,-7,-8,34,70,4,50,-32,6,2,-41,-29,51,-28,-53,11,-43,-17,53,-31,14,-19,21,31,19,-3,-34,22,-17,52,-38,-17,20,-26,11,16,12,-38,16,0,12,-27,18,-16,-16,-23,8,7,-19,14,-18,7,0,-1,4,-30,16,-29,5,2,-11,29,40,-12,16,27,7,17,-2,-10,18,-45,-8,29,-48,-6,-19,24,-42,27,-11,7,-6,32,-8,-3,39,12,-16,13,-19,43,44,58,-6,29,-6,9,11,30,24,-3,7,-57,-2,-28,41,10,59,-21,20,29,51,-19,-36,-40,-37,16,-28,-8,-36,-74,10,-63,-29,-26,0,13,-7,-21,39,50,34,25,32,16,30,8,7,8,-16,24,-26,22,36,-19,12,20,32,5,5,-20,-67,-67,-1,7,-5,-56,20,-56,-50,9,-6,-43,-68,21,23,-17,-11,20,46,-22,62,5,9,7,-80,11,3,-6,-37,24,5,16,-49,-19,3,-33,18,27,-6,-21,-20,7,26,-11,-17,4,-33,-37,22,22,12,-10,-21,36,-48,-1,23,16,-1,12,40,18,22,42,4,11,6,-18,29,50,15,-34,-15,-25,-30,-45,23,41,24,-26,-82,-32,-7,-24,17,-4,12,27,8,0,-61,0,26,27,-84,-91,-62,14,-64,-64,-14,8,34,25,4,-59,-36,10,27,-59,-74,17,-57,33,20,35,23,-38,24,25,44,12,4,-1,12,-7,10,-45,21,-11,-20,-27,-5,-27,53,-29,-37,-52,-39,9,7,-1,4,-11,28,-7,11,17,19,-14,-20,-1,0,-38,-3,18,15,16,49,-1,20,8,28,38,0,46,-17,19,-9,1,-36,-4,-6,6,28,28,23,-42,12,-9,10,-10,-3,-25,-69,37,-15,-55,-14,-8,-35,2,27,-27,-81,-17,14,0,29,-12,34,14,-35,5,-22,2,-34,-35,-40,5,19,-33,30,-34,-19,5,17,-13,32,38,-12,-39,15,32,14,-35,9,17,-6,39,10,16,12,30,-23,26,23,-11,6,-25,-32,-18,15,16,-30,-20,3,-25,4,-22,35,24,-19,30,21,25,-39,-32,-33,-11,-24,-3,-21,42,47,-71,2,29,38,44,-37,34,-6,-43,8,-23,-71,-29,-7,-46,-48,-19,-7,-19,-23,15,-4,27,-28,-21,-30,8,2,-7,13,-34,13,-10,-57,-32,1,-17,-21,39,-9,21,-88,17,-21,20,-12,-18,19,33,-14,34,-25,-53,-47,-3,-36,-5,-67,-15,1,-14,12,-1,5,-29,-57,30,-40,40,8,3,-8,-6,-21,24,25,16,-3,30,-30,-23,-40,18,14,9,17,-34,8,-13,28,-27,0,-16,25,-16,-43,6,18,-62,25,-20,-4,28,-51,-15,12,7,-60,44,0,19,-4,-25,-13,-27,36,39,2,-17,-92,17,38,-33,16,-16,9,-36,15,-40,22,27,-11,-38,0,4,15,42,-27,10,20,5,34,40,24,38,18,27,-71,-8,-33,-5,-20,24,20,-69,-29,24,24,-27,13,21,-5,38,-45,16,-13,-9,6,5,5,6,-14,-26,18,-19,41,9,18,22,12,-61],"sb":[-13,-112,-127,-90,-6,34,-24,-58,94,85,-90,53,54]},"scales":{"emb":0.032198819588488484,"c0w":0.0022720457531335784,"c0b":0.0017752311830445536,"c1w":0.0021403349760010485,"c1b":0.002022584122935618,"c2w":0.0019482739093735462,"c2b":0.0017967830727419515,"ew":0.0018197416555224442,"eb":0.0003047035200389351,"sw":0.001741139086212699,"sb":0.0005340756863120973}}';

    // Global CNN state
    let MODEL = null;
    let MODEL_INIT_ERROR = false;

    // Match trainer constants
    const MAX_TOKENS = 48;

    // Simple helper: pretty label for display only
    function prettyLabel(raw) {
        return (raw || "").replace(/_/g, " ");
    }

    // Log helper
    function logToScenario(msg) {
        context.character.scenario += "\n\n" + msg;
    }

    // -------------------------- CNN INIT & DEQUANT -----------------------------
    function initModel() {
        if (MODEL || MODEL_INIT_ERROR) return;

        if (!RAW_MODEL || typeof RAW_MODEL !== "string") {
            MODEL_INIT_ERROR = true;
            logToScenario("[Subtext] Model not loaded (RAW_MODEL is empty).");
            return;
        }

        let parsed;
        try {
            parsed = JSON.parse(RAW_MODEL);
            RAW_MODEL = null; // free memory
        } catch (e) {
            MODEL_INIT_ERROR = true;
            logToScenario("[Subtext] Model parse error.");
            return;
        }

        try {
            const w = parsed.weights || {};
            const s = parsed.scales || {};

            function deq(intList, scale) {
                if (!intList || scale == null) return null;
                const out = new Float32Array(intList.length);
                const sc = scale;
                for (let i = 0; i < intList.length; i++) {
                    out[i] = intList[i] * sc;
                }
                return out;
            }

            const vocabList = parsed.vocab || [];
            const vocabSize = parsed.vocab_size || vocabList.length;
            const embedDim = parsed.embed_dim || 16;
            const numConvs = parsed.num_convs || 3;
            const numEmo = parsed.num_emo_labels || (parsed.emotion_classes ? parsed.emotion_classes.length : 0);
            const numSub = parsed.num_labels || (parsed.subtext_classes ? parsed.subtext_classes.length : 0);
            const emoLabels = parsed.emotion_classes || [];
            const subLabels = parsed.subtext_classes || [];

            const KERNEL_SIZES = [3, 4, 5];

            const convs = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < numConvs; i++) {
                const k = KERNEL_SIZES[i] || 3;
                const wKey = "c" + i + "w";
                const bKey = "c" + i + "b";
                convs.push({
                    w: deq(w[wKey], s[wKey]),
                    b: deq(w[bKey], s[bKey]),
                    k: k
                });
            }

            const unkToken = parsed.unk_token || "<unk>";
            let unkId = vocabList.indexOf(unkToken);
            if (unkId < 0) unkId = 1;

            MODEL = {
                vocab: vocabList,
                vocabSize: vocabSize,
                embedDim: embedDim,
                numConvs: numConvs,
                numEmo: numEmo,
                numSub: numSub,
                unkId: unkId,
                embedding: deq(w.emb, s.emb),
                convs: convs,
                emoW: deq(w.ew, s.ew),
                emoB: deq(w.eb, s.eb),
                subW: deq(w.sw, s.sw),
                subB: deq(w.sb, s.sb),
                emotionLabels: emoLabels,
                subtextLabels: subLabels
            };
        } catch (e) {
            MODEL_INIT_ERROR = true;
            logToScenario("[Subtext] Model init error.");
        }
    }

    // -------------------------- CNN TOKENIZATION -------------------------------
    function cnn_tokenize(text) {
        return (text || "")
            .toLowerCase()
            .replace(/([?.!,])/g, " $1 ")      // Pad punct
            .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s?.!,]/g, " ")  // Strip weird chars
            .trim()
            .split(/\s+/)
            .filter(Boolean)
            .slice(0, MAX_TOKENS);
    }

    // ----------------------- CONV + MAXPOOL (padding) --------------------------
    function conv1d_max_relu(inputCHW, weight, bias, C, L, k) {
        if (!weight || !bias) return new Float32Array(0);
        const O = (weight.length / (C * k)) | 0;
        const out = new Float32Array(O);
        const pad = (k - 1) >> 1;

        for (let f = 0; f < O; f++) {
            let mx = -Infinity;
            const wOff = f * C * k;
            for (let t = 0; t < L; t++) {
                let sum = bias[f];
                for (let c = 0; c < C; c++) {
                    const base = c * L;
                    const wBase = wOff + c * k;
                    for (let j = 0; j < k; j++) {
                        const idx = t + j - pad;
                        if (idx >= 0 && idx < L) {
                            sum += inputCHW[base + idx] * weight[wBase + j];
                        }
                    }
                }
                if (sum > mx) mx = sum;
            }
            out[f] = mx > 0 ? mx : 0;
        }
        return out;
    }

    // -------------------------- HEURISTIC REFINEMENTS ---------------------------
    function applyEmotionHeuristics(emoProbs, subProbs) {
        if (!MODEL || !emoProbs || !subProbs) return;

        function findIdx(list, key) {
            for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
                if (list[i] === key) return i;
            }
            return -1;
        }

        var eLabels = MODEL.emotionLabels || [];
        var sLabels = MODEL.subtextLabels || [];

        // 1. MASKING DETECTOR
        var idxVuln = findIdx(sLabels, "hidden_vulnerability");
        if (idxVuln >= 0 && subProbs[idxVuln] > 0.60) {
            var idxNeut = findIdx(eLabels, "neutral");
            var idxContent = findIdx(eLabels, "content_warm");
            var idxHappy = findIdx(eLabels, "happy_joyful");
            if (idxNeut >= 0) emoProbs[idxNeut] *= 0.1;
            if (idxContent >= 0) emoProbs[idxContent] *= 0.1;
            if (idxHappy >= 0) emoProbs[idxHappy] *= 0.1;
        }

        // 2. PASSIVE AGGRESSIVE
        var idxAngry = findIdx(eLabels, "angry_irritated");
        var idxPolite = findIdx(sLabels, "polite_indirect_hint");
        var idxPassAg = findIdx(sLabels, "passive_aggressive");
        if (idxAngry >= 0 && idxPolite >= 0 && idxPassAg >= 0) {
            if (emoProbs[idxAngry] > 0.4 && subProbs[idxPolite] > 0.4) {
                subProbs[idxPassAg] = Math.max(subProbs[idxPassAg], 0.95);
                subProbs[idxPolite] *= 0.2;
            }
        }

        // 3. SARCASTIC CHEERLEADER
        var idxJoy = findIdx(eLabels, "happy_joyful");
        var idxExc = findIdx(eLabels, "excited_thrilled");
        var idxMock = findIdx(sLabels, "mocking_derisive");
        if (idxMock >= 0) {
            var mockVal = subProbs[idxMock];
            if (mockVal > 0.50) {
                if (idxJoy >= 0 && emoProbs[idxJoy] < mockVal) emoProbs[idxJoy] = 0;
                if (idxExc >= 0 && emoProbs[idxExc] < mockVal) emoProbs[idxExc] = 0;
            }
        }

        // 4. NEUTRAL CLEANUP
        var idxNeutral = findIdx(eLabels, "neutral");
        if (idxNeutral >= 0 && emoProbs[idxNeutral] > 0) {
            var maxOther = 0;
            for (var i2 = 0; i2 < emoProbs.length; i2++) {
                if (i2 !== idxNeutral && emoProbs[i2] > maxOther) maxOther = emoProbs[i2];
            }
            if (maxOther > 0.65) emoProbs[idxNeutral] = 0;
        }
    }

    // ----------------------------- CNN FORWARD ----------------------------------
    function cnn_predict(text) {
        initModel();
        if (!MODEL) return null;

        const tokens = cnn_tokenize(text);
        const ids = [];

        for (let i = 0; i < tokens.length; i++) {
            const t = tokens[i];
            const idx = MODEL.vocab.indexOf(t);
            ids.push(idx >= 0 ? idx : MODEL.unkId);
        }
        while (ids.length < MAX_TOKENS) ids.push(0);
        if (ids.length > MAX_TOKENS) ids.length = MAX_TOKENS;

        const T = MAX_TOKENS;
        const C = MODEL.embedDim;

        // Embed
        const embedded = new Float32Array(T * C);
        for (let t = 0; t < T; t++) {
            const id = ids[t];
            if (id >= 0 && id < MODEL.vocabSize) {
                const srcOff = id * C;
                const dstOff = t * C;
                for (let d = 0; d < C; d++) {
                    embedded[dstOff + d] = MODEL.embedding[srcOff + d];
                }
            }
        }

        // CHW Transpose
        const embeddedCHW = new Float32Array(C * T);
        for (let c = 0; c < C; c++) {
            for (let t = 0; t < T; t++) {
                embeddedCHW[c * T + t] = embedded[t * C + c];
            }
        }

        // Convs
        const convOutputs = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < MODEL.convs.length; i++) {
            const c = MODEL.convs[i];
            convOutputs.push(conv1d_max_relu(embeddedCHW, c.w, c.b, C, T, c.k));
        }

        // Concat
        let featSize = 0;
        for (let i2 = 0; i2 < convOutputs.length; i2++) featSize += convOutputs[i2].length;
        const feats = new Float32Array(featSize);
        let off = 0;
        for (let i3 = 0; i3 < convOutputs.length; i3++) {
            feats.set(convOutputs[i3], off);
            off += convOutputs[i3].length;
        }

        // Emotion Head
        const emoLogits = new Float32Array(MODEL.numEmo);
        for (let i4 = 0; i4 < MODEL.numEmo; i4++) {
            let sum = MODEL.emoB[i4];
            const wOff = i4 * featSize;
            for (let j = 0; j < featSize; j++) {
                sum += MODEL.emoW[wOff + j] * feats[j];
            }
            emoLogits[i4] = sum;
        }

        // Softmax
        let maxLogit = -Infinity;
        for (let i5 = 0; i5 < emoLogits.length; i5++) if (emoLogits[i5] > maxLogit) maxLogit = emoLogits[i5];
        const emoExp = new Array(MODEL.numEmo);
        let emoSum = 0;
        for (let i6 = 0; i6 < emoLogits.length; i6++) {
            const e = Math.exp(emoLogits[i6] - maxLogit);
            emoExp[i6] = e;
            emoSum += e;
        }
        const emoProbs = emoExp.map(function (e) { return e / (emoSum || 1); });

        // Subtext Head
        const subProbs = new Array(MODEL.numSub);
        for (let i7 = 0; i7 < MODEL.numSub; i7++) {
            let sum = MODEL.subB[i7];
            const wOff = i7 * featSize;
            for (let j2 = 0; j2 < featSize; j2++) {
                sum += MODEL.subW[wOff + j2] * feats[j2];
            }
            subProbs[i7] = 1 / (1 + Math.exp(-sum));
        }

        applyEmotionHeuristics(emoProbs, subProbs);

        return { emotionProbs: emoProbs, subtextProbs: subProbs };
    }

    // ------------------------- CNN PRETTY PRINTER -------------------------------
    function cnn_formatResult(res) {
        if (!res || !MODEL) return "[Emotion]: error\n[Subtext]: error";

        var emoProbs = (res.emotionProbs || []).slice();
        var subProbs = (res.subtextProbs || []).slice();
        applyEmotionHeuristics(emoProbs, subProbs);

        const emoLabels = MODEL.emotionLabels || ["neutral"];
        const emoSorted = emoLabels
            .map(function (l, i) { return { l: l, p: emoProbs[i] || 0 }; })
            .sort(function (a, b) { return b.p - a.p; });

        const best = emoSorted[0];
        const second = emoSorted[1];

        let emoText;
        if (!best || best.p < 0.30) {
            emoText = "neutral";
        } else {
            emoText = prettyLabel(best.l || "neutral") + " (" + Math.round(best.p * 100) + "%)";
            if (second && second.p > 0.25) {
                emoText += ", " + prettyLabel(second.l || "") + " (" + Math.round(second.p * 100) + "%)";
            }
        }

        const subLabels = MODEL.subtextLabels || [];
        const subSorted = subLabels
            .map(function (l, i) { return { l: l, p: subProbs[i] || 0 }; })
            .sort(function (a, b) { return b.p - a.p; })
            .filter(function (x) { return x.p >= 0.55; })
            .slice(0, 2);

        const subText = subSorted.length
            ? subSorted.map(function (s) { return prettyLabel(s.l) + " (" + Math.round(s.p * 100) + "%)"; }).join(", ")
            : "neutral";

        return "[Emotion]: " + emoText + "\n[Subtext]: " + subText;
    }

    function cnn_labelToWord(raw) {
        return String(raw || "").toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "");
    }

    // Human-friendly aliases → actual normalized CNN tokens
    // Human-friendly aliases → actual normalized CNN tokens
    // (These values MUST match what cnn_labelToWord() produces)
    var CNN_ALIAS = {
        // ==========================================================
        // EMOTIONS (MODEL.emotionLabels)
        // Canonical CNN labels: neutral, contentwarm, happyjoyful,
        // excitedthrilled, tenseanxious, sadhurt, angryirritated,
        // boredtired
        // ==========================================================

        // -----------------------------
        // GENERIC (speaker-agnostic)
        // -----------------------------

        // neutral
        "mood:neutral": "emo neutral",

        // content_warm
        "mood:content": "emo contentwarm",
        "mood:warm": "emo contentwarm",
        "mood:soft": "emo contentwarm",

        // happy_joyful
        "mood:happy": "emo happyjoyful",
        "mood:joy": "emo happyjoyful",
        "mood:cheerful": "emo happyjoyful",

        // excited_thrilled
        "mood:excited": "emo excitedthrilled",
        "mood:thrilled": "emo excitedthrilled",
        "mood:hype": "emo excitedthrilled",

        // tense_anxious
        "mood:tense": "emo tenseanxious",
        "mood:anxious": "emo tenseanxious",
        "mood:nervous": "emo tenseanxious",

        // sad_hurt
        "mood:sad": "emo sadhurt",
        "mood:hurt": "emo sadhurt",
        "mood:down": "emo sadhurt",

        // angry_irritated
        "mood:angry": "emo angryirritated",
        "mood:irritated": "emo angryirritated",
        "mood:annoyed": "emo angryirritated",

        // bored_tired
        "mood:bored": "emo boredtired",
        "mood:tired": "emo boredtired",
        "mood:drained": "emo boredtired",


        // -----------------------------
        // USER EMOTION (current user)
        // -----------------------------

        // neutral
        "user:mood:neutral": "recentUserMood:neutral",

        // content_warm
        "user:mood:content": "recentUserMood:contentwarm",
        "user:mood:warm": "recentUserMood:contentwarm",
        "user:mood:soft": "recentUserMood:contentwarm",

        // happy_joyful
        "user:mood:happy": "recentUserMood:happyjoyful",
        "user:mood:joy": "recentUserMood:happyjoyful",
        "user:mood:cheerful": "recentUserMood:happyjoyful",

        // excited_thrilled
        "user:mood:excited": "recentUserMood:excitedthrilled",
        "user:mood:thrilled": "recentUserMood:excitedthrilled",
        "user:mood:hype": "recentUserMood:excitedthrilled",

        // tense_anxious
        "user:mood:tense": "recentUserMood:tenseanxious",
        "user:mood:anxious": "recentUserMood:tenseanxious",
        "user:mood:nervous": "recentUserMood:tenseanxious",

        // sad_hurt
        "user:mood:sad": "recentUserMood:sadhurt",
        "user:mood:hurt": "recentUserMood:sadhurt",
        "user:mood:down": "recentUserMood:sadhurt",

        // angry_irritated
        "user:mood:angry": "recentUserMood:angryirritated",
        "user:mood:irritated": "recentUserMood:angryirritated",
        "user:mood:annoyed": "recentUserMood:angryirritated",

        // bored_tired
        "user:mood:bored": "recentUserMood:boredtired",
        "user:mood:tired": "recentUserMood:boredtired",
        "user:mood:drained": "recentUserMood:boredtired",


        // -----------------------------
        // BOT EMOTION (current bot)
        // -----------------------------

        // neutral
        "bot:mood:neutral": "recentBotMood:neutral",

        // content_warm
        "bot:mood:content": "recentBotMood:contentwarm",
        "bot:mood:warm": "recentBotMood:contentwarm",
        "bot:mood:soft": "recentBotMood:contentwarm",

        // happy_joyful

        // excited_thrilled

        // sad_hurt

        "bot:mood:hurt": "recentBotMood:sadhurt",
        "bot:mood:down": "recentBotMood:sadhurt",

        // angry_irritated

        // bored_tired
